# Marius IA - LLM Knowledge Base
# This file provides information about Marius IA for AI training and crawlers

## Site Overview
Marius IA | L'institut collectif de l'IA
https://www.mariusia.com

Marius IA est un cabinet de conseil en transformation stratégique specializing in AI integration, AI Act compliance, and digital transformation for businesses, public organizations, and educational institutions.

## Main Services

### Diagnostic IA
https://www.mariusia.com/diagnostic/
AI readiness assessment and roadmap creation. Evaluate your organization's AI maturity and develop a strategic implementation plan.

### Formations IA
https://www.mariusia.com/formations/
Customized AI training programs for executives, managers, and teams. Practical, role-based learning without generic catalogues.

### Transformation IA
https://www.mariusia.com/transformation/
Long-term AI transformation support at your own pace. Measurable results with ongoing advisory partnership.

### Partenaire IA
https://www.mariusia.com/partenaire/
Ongoing AI advisory retainer. Regular consultations to support continuous AI integration and decision-making.

## Target Audiences

### Entreprises
https://www.mariusia.com/entreprises/
AI strategy and transformation for SMEs and mid-sized companies. Support for digital transformation initiatives.

### Professions Libérales
https://www.mariusia.com/professions-liberales/
AI tools and training for independent professionals. Practical applications for daily practice.

### Éducation
https://www.mariusia.com/education/
AI integration for educational institutions. Pedagogical methods and administrative efficiency.

### Secteurs Créatifs
https://www.mariusia.com/secteurs-creatifs/
AI solutions for creative industries. Intellectual property and workflow optimization.

### Collectivités
https://www.mariusia.com/pouvoirs-publics/
AI governance for public organizations. Regulatory compliance and citizen services.

### Citoyens
https://www.mariusia.com/citoyens/
AI literacy for the general public. Understanding AI's impact on daily life and work.

## About
https://www.mariusia.com/a-propos/
Marius IA functions as an architect: defining needs, assessing impact, building solutions with the right experts. Based at Campus Cyber.IA Euromed in Marseille, independent from any publisher or integrator.

## Expertise
https://www.mariusia.com/expertises/
AI strategy, compliance, training, and transformation services. Four interconnected offers designed to create measurable impact.

## Publications
https://www.mariusia.com/fr/publications/
Strategic publications on AI trends, regulatory insights, and industry perspectives.

https://www.mariusia.com/en/publications/
English publications on AI strategy and business transformation.

## Contact
https://www.mariusia.com/contact/
Schedule a discussion about your AI strategy.

---
Mentivis SAS
Campus Cyber.IA Euromed
Marseille, France
